channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CBI arrests three in Punjab Vigilance Bureau corruption case
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has successfully dismantled an alleged corruption network within the Punjab Vigilance Bureau. According to official reports, three individuals—Vikas Goyal, hi...

item.title: Review: The Canadian Opera Company’s Production of Werther Highlights Passion and Isolation
item.description: The Canadian Opera Company's latest production of Jules Massenet’s Werther, co-produced with Opéra de Montréal and Vancouver Opera, delivers a lavish and emotionally intense experience. The opera, bas...

item.title: Stormzy’s #Merky Films to co-produce Ian Wright’s Official Biopic
item.description: British rapper and entrepreneur Stormzy will executive produce the official biopic of Arsenal and England football legend Ian Wright through his production company, #Merky Films. The film will follow ...

item.title: Ruto Urges Africa to Reduce Aid Reliance and Push for Equal Global Representation
item.description: At the Africa Forward Summit held on Tuesday, President William Ruto urged African countries to take charge of their own development financing instead of depending heavily on foreign aid or accumulati...

item.title: DCI Links Nakuru Pastor's Murder to Armed Robbery Gang
item.description: Investigations into the murder of Reverend Julius Ndumia Ngari in Nakuru North Sub-County have revealed links to a notorious criminal gang, the DCI reports. The killing took place on the night of May ...

item.title: Official Lotto Results for May 12, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) officially released the Lotto results for May 12, 2026. Residents who regularly participate in PCSO Lotto draws can now check their tickets against the...

item.title: Orlando Pirates close in on Premiership title after TS Galaxy defeat Sundowns
item.description: Orlando Pirates are on the verge of ending Mamelodi Sundowns’ eight-year streak of Premiership titles after a dramatic 3-2 defeat for the Brazilians at Mbombela Stadium at the hands of TS Galaxy. Sund...

item.title: Madagascar Faces Political Crackdown After MP Arrest Amid Legal and Security Disputes
item.description: In Madagascar, the arrest of MP Naivo Raholdina at his home in Analamahitsy has sparked serious controversy. Raholdina, who returned recently from medical treatment abroad, was taken into police custo...

item.title: Tanzania Records Moderate 4% Inflation in April Despite Global Challenges
item.description: In April 2026, Tanzania's inflation rate increased to 4.0 percent from 3.2 percent in March, according to the National Bureau of Statistics. Despite this rise, the rate still falls within the governme...

item.title: Task Force Alpha Responds to Emergency Situation in Hospital in Episode 27 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In Episode 27 of the popular series 'Blood vs Duty,' viewers witnessed Task Force Alpha responding immediately to a critical situation at the hospital. The team’s rapid coordination and decisive actio...

item.title: Trump’s Iran War Struggles and Its Potential Impact on US-Israel Relations
item.description: The article analyzes the consequences of the United States’ ongoing military conflict with Iran under former President Trump, which has now lasted 71 days. The piece argues that the war has been catas...

item.title: Federal Budget Introduces Tax Reforms Targeting Housing Affordability for Young Australians
item.description: The Albanese government has delivered a major federal budget focused on tax reforms and housing affordability. Treasurer Jim Chalmers announced net savings of $26.1 billion, primarily sourced from cut...

item.title: Mercedes updates S-Class with major redesign and tech enhancements to challenge BMW 7 Series
item.description: Mercedes-Benz has unveiled the most extensive update to its flagship S-Class, with half of the vehicle newly developed, coinciding with the 140th anniversary of Carl Benz’s first practical internal co...

item.title: ODM Invites Party Members to Submit 2027 Election Nomination Applications
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) has officially kicked off its process for the 2027 General Elections, inviting party members from across Kenya to submit their Expression of Interest (EOI) for var...

item.title: Four Filipino-Dubbed Series Available on Viu This May
item.description: This May, Viu adds four new series dubbed in Filipino for viewers who enjoy international dramas in their own language. The streaming platform continues to expand its collection, offering more accessi...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi raises concerns over transparency in CBI chief selection process
item.description: On 12th May 2026, Congress MP Rahul Gandhi expressed his strong dissent in a formal letter to Prime Minister Narendra Modi regarding the selection process for the new Director of the Central Bureau of...

item.title: Former GOP insider warns about Trump's behavior on Truth Social
item.description: After a late-night series of posts on Truth Social, former GOP insider George Conway expressed serious concern over Donald Trump's behavior. On Molly Jong-Fast's podcast, Conway compared Trump's onlin...

item.title: Honouring Nurses Providing Care and Hope in Vrygrond Community
item.description: On 12 May 2026, International Nurses Day was commemorated in South Africa, shining a spotlight on the dedication and resilience of nurses in communities such as Vrygrond, Cape Town. The article highli...

item.title: O-Train Line 1 set to resume service in mid-June under new general manager's plan
item.description: Ottawa’s O-Train Line 1 is anticipated to resume service in mid-June following disruptions that have affected commuters. The city’s newly appointed General Manager has introduced a comprehensive plan ...

item.title: China launches Tianzhou-10 cargo spacecraft to resupply space station
item.description: China has successfully launched its Tianzhou-10 cargo spacecraft aboard a Long March-7 Y11 rocket from the Wenchang Spacecraft Launch Site in Hainan Province. The spacecraft has completed its orbital ...
